generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm convinced we're on the right track. The recent cyber-attacks on our allies show why we can't rely on others for our security. It's not about isolation—it's about being prepared. Look at how Germany is stepping up its defense spending. They're not doing it out of fear, but out of responsibility. We should too. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
